emergency_definitions: Active sprinkler leak with flooding risk
Fire alarm panel outage in occupied building

routing_rules.trigger: Caller reports active sprinkler leak or suppression emergency

routing_rules.notes: Collect property address and best callback

after_hours_handling: Emergency calls should be escalated to dispatch. Non-emergency requests are collected for next business day follow-up.
fallback_logic: If transfer fails, apologize and confirm dispatch will follow up.
integration_rules: Create ServiceTrade ticket for all non-emergency requests
Tag emergency calls for immediate follow-up
special_constraints: Do not provide pricing on calls
Confirm life-safety issues before ending emergency calls
